testcase.name: entityGraph_debeCargaDetallesCompletos

02:57:44.830 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.ecommerce.OrderRelationsTest]: OrderRelationsTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 02:57:45.200 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.ecommerce.Sesion2Application for test class com.ecommerce.OrderRelationsTest . ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/

core version 6.5.2.Final 2026-06-08T02:57:48.218-05:00 INFO 2220 --- [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-06-08T02:57:48.795-05:00 INFO 2220 --- [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-06-08T02:57:48.907-05:00 WARN 2220 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-08T02:57:50.648-05:00 INFO 2220 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists customers cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists order_items cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists orders cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists products cascade Hibernate: create table customers ( vip boolean not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(150) not null, address varchar(500), email varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table order_items ( quantity integer not null, unit_price float(53) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, product_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table orders ( total float(53) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, status enum ('CANCELLED','DELIVERED','PAID','PENDING','SHIPPED') not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table products ( price float(53) not null, stock integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(200) not null, category enum ('CLOTHING','ELECTRONICS','FOOD','SPORTS') not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists order_items add constraint FKbioxgbv59vetrxe0ejfubep1w foreign key (order_id) references orders Hibernate: alter table if exists order_items add constraint FKocimc7dtr037rh4ls4l95nlfi foreign key (product_id) references products Hibernate: alter table if exists orders add constraint FKpxtb8awmi0dk6smoh2vp1litg foreign key (customer_id) references customers 2026-06-08T02:57:50.763-05:00 INFO 2220 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-08T02:57:51.317-05:00 INFO 2220 --- [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-06-08T02:57:52.507-05:00 INFO 2220 --- [ main] com.ecommerce.OrderRelationsTest : Started OrderRelationsTest in 7.173 seconds i1_0.product_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.category, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.stock, i1_0.quantity, i1_0.unit_price, o1_0.status, o1_0.total from orders o1_0 join customers c1_0 on c1_0.id=o1_0.customer_id left join order_items i1_0 on o1_0.id=i1_0.order_id left join products p1_0 on p1_0.id=i1_0.product_id where o1_0.id=?

Hibernate: update orders set created_at=?, customer_id=?, status=?, total=? where id=? Hibernate: delete from order_items where id=? Hibernate: select o1_0.id, o1_0.created_at, o1_0.customer_id, c1_0.id, c1_0.address, c1_0.email, c1_0.name, c1_0.vip, i1_0.order_id, i1_0.id, i1_0.product_id, p1_0.id, p1_0.category, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.stock, i1_0.quantity, i1_0.unit_price, o1_0.status, o1_0.total from orders o1_0 join customers c1_0 on c1_0.id=o1_0.customer_id left join order_items i1_0 on o1_0.id=i1_0.order_id left join products p1_0 on p1_0.id=i1_0.product_id where o1_0.id=?

testcase.name: subquery_debeDetectarProductosSinPedidos
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into customers (address, email, name, vip, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into customers (address, email, name, vip, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into products (category, name, price, stock, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into products (category, name, price, stock, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into products (category, name, price, stock, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into orders (created_at, customer_id, status, total, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into order_items (order_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into order_items (order_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.category, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.stock from products p1_0 where p1_0.id not in (select distinct oi1_0.product_id from order_items oi1_0)
